testcase.name: test_grouped_textbox_reaches_translate_texts_payload

failure.message: AssertionError: grouped text missing from outgoing payload: ['Flat sibling text'] assert 'Grouped alpha text' in ['Flat sibling text']

testcase.failure: tests/test_pptx_group_shapes.py:143: in test_grouped_textbox_reaches_translate_texts_payload assert "Grouped alpha text" in uniq, f"grouped text missing from outgoing payload: {uniq}" E AssertionError: grouped text missing from outgoing payload: ['Flat sibling text'] E assert 'Grouped alpha text' in ['Flat sibling text']
